summary: Iteration 113 - Toggle Harmonization Testing: Verified 3 changes for external calendar toggle harmonization between Dashboard and Agenda. Backend APIs working (6/8 tests passed, 2 skipped due to no calendar connected). Frontend UI verified - view selector works, CalendarSyncPanel not visible because test user has no calendar providers connected (expected behavior).

backend_api: ⏭️ SKIPPED: Toggle ON/OFF tests - No calendar provider connected for test user
frontend_playwright: ✅ Login flow: Navigate to /signin, login with igaal@hotmail.com / Test123!, redirect to /dashboard
✅ Dashboard loads correctly with engagement list
✅ View selector works: Month/Week/Day toggle buttons functional
✅ Week view displays correctly with time grid
✅ Day view displays correctly with time grid + event sidebar
✅ Month view displays correctly with calendar grid and NLYT event dots
code_review_verification: ✅ AgendaPage.js line 122: settingChangeRef = useRef(false) - Guard anti double-clic implemented
✅ AgendaPage.js lines 144-153: handleImportSettingChange uses settingChangeRef guard
✅ AgendaPage.js line 150: Toggle ON calls loadExternalEvents() NOT fetchAllEvents() - Correct refetch behavior
✅ AgendaPage.js line 151: Toggle OFF filters events locally without API call - Correct
✅ AgendaPage.js lines 203-234: Auto-refresh 2-minute interval implemented with syncIntervalRef
✅ AgendaPage.js line 229: setLastAutoCheckAt(new Date().toISOString()) - Updates auto-check timestamp
✅ AgendaPage.js line 341: CalendarSyncPanel receives lastAutoCheckAt prop
✅ OrganizerDashboard.js line 645: settingChangeRef = useRef(false) - Guard anti double-clic implemented
✅ OrganizerDashboard.js lines 647-656: handleImportSettingChange uses settingChangeRef guard
✅ OrganizerDashboard.js lines 689-716: Auto-refresh 2-minute interval identical to Agenda
✅ CalendarSyncPanel.js lines 82-86: Displays 'Contrôle auto' indicator when lastAutoCheckAt is set

critical_code_review_comments: 1. Refetch ciblé: AgendaPage handleImportSettingChange calls loadExternalEvents() on toggle ON (line 150), NOT fetchAllEvents() - this avoids refetching my-timeline
2. Guard anti double-clic: Both AgendaPage (line 122) and OrganizerDashboard (line 645) use useRef-based settingChangeRef to prevent concurrent calls
3. Auto-refresh 2min: AgendaPage (lines 203-234) has identical 120_000ms interval pattern as Dashboard (lines 689-716), with lastAutoCheckAt passed to CalendarSyncPanel
✅ CalendarSyncPanel correctly receives and displays lastAutoCheckAt prop with 'Contrôle auto' indicator

success_rate.backend: 100% (6/6 executed tests passed, 2 skipped - no calendar connected)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Toggle harmonization verified via code review. Test user (igaal@hotmail.com) has no calendar providers connected, so CalendarSyncPanel is not visible. To fully test toggle behavior with network requests, a user with Google or Outlook calendar connected is needed. The 3 changes are: (1) AgendaPage toggle ON calls loadExternalEvents() not fetchAllEvents(), (2) Both pages have settingChangeRef guard, (3) Both pages have 2-minute auto-refresh interval with lastAutoCheckAt.
